title: Cobbled Armor & Tool Trims - Cobblemon
description: Use the power of Cobblemon and use the Type Gems to customise your armour even further!
body:
![Update Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/368891a9a032aabafcad11f7f77c21acbb20644b.png)


# THE BIG TOOL UPDATE IT OUT NOW! 
You can trim your Weapons and Tools for even more variety. 


### More Customisation
Enhance your Armor & Tools with a splash of personality. 

Use your favorite Type Gem, Evolution Stone and now Tumblestone from Cobblemon to trim your armor and tools for over 50'000 unique combinations. Whether you're a water trainer or an Elite 4 member there will be a combination to fit your style perfectly.

**PLEASE NOTE, THIS MOD WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITH MODS THAT ADD NEW TOOLS, TOOL TRIMS OR TRIM MATERIALS**

![Tool Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46c906574e2d8885af9f1ba4a7ff9564411a8d26.png)
